# mdkg agent bootstrap

Read `AGENT_START.md` first.

Key files:
- `.mdkg/core/SOUL.md`
- `.mdkg/core/HUMAN.md`
- `.mdkg/README.md`
- `CLI_COMMAND_MATRIX.md`

First commands:
- `mdkg search "..."`
- `mdkg show <id>`
- `mdkg next`
- `mdkg pack <id>`
- `mdkg skill list --tags stage:plan --json`
- `mdkg validate`
